situation: A media outlet has published sexist content, sparking public outcry.

options.action: Issue a public apology and remove the content
options.consequence: Mitigate reputational damage and demonstrate commitment to gender equality

options.action: Defend the content as freedom of speech
options.consequence: Exacerbate reputational damage and face backlash from women's rights groups

common_rookie_mistake: Failing to acknowledge and apologize for sexist content
consequence_if_wrong: Reputational damage and loss of public trust
rationale: Acknowledging and apologizing for sexist content demonstrates a commitment to gender equality and helps to mitigate reputational damage.

situation: A media outlet is looking to improve its coverage of gender issues and promote gender equality.

options.action: Implement diversity and inclusion training for journalists
options.consequence: Improve coverage of gender issues and promote gender equality

options.action: Ignore the issue and continue with existing practices
options.consequence: Perpetuate sexist stereotypes and reinforce gender inequality

common_rookie_mistake: Failing to provide diversity and inclusion training for journalists
consequence_if_wrong: Perpetuation of sexist stereotypes and reinforcement of gender inequality
rationale: Diversity and inclusion training for journalists can help to improve coverage of gender issues and promote gender equality.
